BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX_AmyloidModifier
BundleInfo.Author: Songxian Ou
BundleInfo.Synopsis: A GUI tool for analyzing, trimming, and renaming multi-layer amyloid fibril structures.
BundleInfo.Description: Amyloid Modifier is a specialized GUI tool designed for cryo-EM researchers working with multi-layer amyloid fibrils and complex polymer structures. It automatically detects protofilaments and horizontal layers based on geometric centroids, allowing users to quickly trim ragged fibril ends, systematically rename chaotic chain IDs from the middle out, quick recalculate DSSP secondary structures, and generate ISOLDE torsion restraint files. CIF mode is typically only for trimming the best layers from a broken model generated by ModelAngelo

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: ChimeraX :: Tool :: Amyloid Modifier :: Structure Editing :: Modifies multi-layer chains

Tool.name: Amyloid Modifier
Tool.description: Modify and process multi-layer amyloid fibril structures
